name: Paris Boat Trip France - VR Travel

reviews.review_description:
This was clearly taken on a random tourist boat on some guy's phone, the quality is atrocious. There are babies crying and people talking, you can't pause or fast forward.
I tried to enjoy it anyways but the poor quality gave me a headache.

Basically a video taken by a guy with a 360 camera walking around, not scripted, my head is dizzy with his camera movements. And the quality is HORRIFIC. Also takes a few seconds to load for such a low quality video clip. Yes it’s only $1.99 but there’s a dozen FREE 360 degree VR videos you can find on YouTube that’s higher quality.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We regret that the video quality in the earlier version did not meet your expectations. In the current version, we have significantly improved the quality of the footage and streaming to deliver an even more impressive experience.

Our app is designed to provide the most realistic experience possible. You begin your journey on the banks of the Seine, directly opposite the stunning Notre-Dame Cathedral. From your vantage point, you can take in the beauty of the cathedral while waiting for your boat – a unique moment that captures the essence of the app.

Once the boat arrives, your journey along the Seine begins, passing historic bridges, the Parisian Statue of Liberty, and finally reaching the Eiffel Tower.

A quick note: The experience can be paused at any time and resumed exactly where you left off, allowing you to enjoy your virtual trip through Paris at your own pace.

We appreciate your feedback and use it to continuously improve our content. 

The newer VR experiences from London, Pisa, and Florence have been captured using the latest technology, ensuring an even more breathtaking level of quality.

reviews.review_description: Hey what happened? The video is not loading.

Have you ever wondered what it would like if you had finally booked the vacation of your dreams. To Paris, no less! You sign up for a boat tour of Paris and excitedly await for the ride to start.

Just as you get to the pier, someone accidentally knocks your glasses off and they fall into water. You have no spare so you're just going to have to see the sights without your trusty pair of corrective lenses.

Well if this weirdly specific experience is what you've always wanted, this 360 degree video tour is for you! Experience Paris in all it's 240p potato-definition glory! You're a tall giant, probably dutch and whenever you look down, you're treated to a lovely sight of a subtly balding middle-aged man's head from bird's eye view. It is then that you're truly glad you lost your glasses and count your blessings.

Experience all the drawbacks of stuffing yourself into a crowed tour boat with stunning ultra-realistic ambience. Babies crying loudly? Of course! People being otherwise noisy and ruining the experience? How else? It truly captivates the underwhelming experience of these cheap tours. It's the one thing it does right.

There are no controls for the playback. Just like in real life, you're stuck there with no way to get out or get to the good parts. No settings or anything. It's just basically a VR 360 degree video but you can't even watch it in a good VR video player where you could tweak the experience.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We regret that the video quality in the earlier version did not meet your expectations. In the current version, we have significantly improved the quality of the footage and streaming to deliver an even more impressive experience. Additionally, our newer VR experiences from London, Pisa, and Florence have been captured using the latest technology, ensuring an even more breathtaking level of quality.

Our VR app offers more than just a video; it's a complete immersive journey to Paris. It's about taking the time to engage in an authentic day trip. Imagine you're really there – feel the ambiance, hear the sounds of the city, and be enchanted by the beauty of the Seine. This experience is designed to make you feel like part of the environment, not just a passive observer.

The VR tour is streamed in 4K quality, though streaming quality may vary depending on your internet connection and country. In the USA and Europe, you can expect the best quality. With Meta money-back guarantee, there's no risk in giving it a try!

We invite you to explore Paris at a pace that mirrors reality. Our app is an invitation to delve into the City of Love, rather than just quickly navigating through content. For just $1.99, we enable you to experience the soul of Paris, with the freedom to enjoy moments as they truly are. Embrace the experience.

reviews.review_description: I bought this app as a part of the VR travel mega bundle 3. Before that, exactly one year ago, I have booked Paris travel, and had plans to take such a boat tour too. Unortunately, I had to cancel entire travel and thus haven't taken the boat tour too. Now, with this VR app I could immerse into it and enjoy the tour along the Seine by seeing the iconic editices of the romantic city of love. Also cool thing about the bundle is that included in it is also a boat tour on the Themse. So you can compare these tours, cities, atmosphere &c.
